facts: description: Use Trivy vulnerability scanner in offline mode to discover security vulnerabilities in dependency files. This skill covers setting up offline scanning, executing Trivy against package lock files, and generating JSON vulnerability reports without requiring internet access.
This skill provides guidance on using Trivy, an open-source security scanner, to discover vulnerabilities in software dependencies using offline mode.
